mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that reduces discount rates for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 315 in the CPIAUCSL index signals central bank inaction, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days as real rates rise.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 315.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in FEDFUNDS and CPIAUCSL indicate tightening monetary policy amid inflation, creating headwinds for equity markets and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 days.
failure_condition: SPX shows positive 20d returns in > 60% of cases where both FEDFUNDS and CPIAUCSL rise simultaneously.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth above 159,105 thousand in PAYEMS signals robust labor market demand, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 60% of instances where PAYEMS exceeds 159,105 thousand.

mechanism_narrative: A Fed funds rate above 5% during a monetary tightening cycle signals hawkish policy, suppressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 days.
failure_condition: SPX shows positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where FEDFUNDS exceeds 5%.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production (INDPRO) above 103.1389 indicates strong manufacturing activity, boosting corporate earnings and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of instances where INDPRO exceeds 103.1389.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating housing starts (HOUST) above 1,356 thousand signals strong demand for residential construction, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over 5 days.
failure_condition: SPX shows negative 5d returns in > 60% of cases where HOUST exceeds 1,356 thousand.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in GDP (GDPC1) and stable inflation (CPIAUCSL < 315) indicates sustainable economic expansion, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 60 days.
failure_condition: SPX shows negative 60d returns in > 60% of instances where GDPC1 rises and CPIAUCSL remains below 315.
